title: Verify cleanup: remove locked PR4 worktree directory
description: PR #4 merged and main CI is healthy, but the deregistered worktree directory <LOCAL_WORKTREE_PATH> remains locked by another local process and could not be removed during /verify.

title: Fix postcss vulnerability blocking PR4 validate
description: Validation is blocked by bun audit reporting GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 for postcss <8.5.10 in the current dependency tree. Investigate the transitive path from meeting-web and roadmap-web dependencies, update to a patched version or compatible overrides, and re-run bun audit before resuming PR4 ship readiness.
close_reason: Fixed in 4e82387 by pinning postcss 8.5.10 and regenerating bun.lock; bun audit now passes.

title: PR2 Validation Baseline
description: Plan and execute PR2 so Product Suite has one root-level validation baseline across roadmap-web, meeting-web, and meeting-api before deeper refactors.

title: Post-merge: leftover PR1 worktree directory locked by Dolt process
description: After verifying merged PR #1 on origin/main, the feature branch was deleted and the Git worktree registration was removed. The leftover directory <LOCAL_WORKTREE_PATH> could not be fully deleted because .beads/dolt files (journal.idx, LOCK, dolt-server.log) are held open by running dolt.exe sql-server processes. Cleanup needs follow-up once the locking process is identified or stopped.
close_reason: Cleanup completed during verify: stopped Dolt server on port 63720, removed leftover PR1 directory, feature branch already deleted.

title: PR4 Contracts Nucleus
description: Plan and execute PR4 so Product Suite gets a minimal shared contracts nucleus spanning roadmap-web, meeting-web, and meeting-api without freezing app-local domain truth too early.
notes:
Validation blocked on product-suite-9cy after bun audit reported GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 (postcss <8.5.10). All typecheck, lint, build, and test checks passed; only the security scan failed.
Validate blocker resolved in 4e82387 by pinning postcss 8.5.10 at the root override level and regenerating bun.lock. bun audit, validate:meeting-web, validate:roadmap-web, validate:meeting-api, test:contracts, and repo-tooling tests all passed afterward.

comments.author: Harsha Nanda
comments.text: Validate result: branch is up to date with main and all scoped PR4 code checks passed, but bun audit failed on GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 for postcss <8.5.10. Tracking blocker: product-suite-9cy.

comments.author: Harsha Nanda
comments.text: Security blocker fixed in 4e82387. Added a root postcss 8.5.10 override, regenerated bun.lock, and re-ran the full scoped PR4 validation set successfully: bun audit, bun run test:contracts, bun test test/repo-tooling.test.js, bun run validate:meeting-web, bun run validate:roadmap-web, bun run validate:meeting-api.

comments.author: Harsha Nanda
comments.text: PR created: https://github.com/harshanandak/Product-Suite/pull/4. Ship summary: PR4 contracts nucleus with packages/contracts, web app adoption, meeting-api runtime payload validation, and the postcss 8.5.10 audit fix. Review focus: shared contract surface stays minimal and does not imply false domain unification.

comments.author: Harsha Nanda
comments.text: Review update: resolved the live-sync blocker by moving roadmap shared aliases into a companion supabase module, added contracts-triggered CI coverage for meeting-web/roadmap-web/meeting-api workflows, added a real pre-commit source-test coupling check, added contracts package type declarations and artifact parity tests, and fixed meeting-web runtime-config alias handling. Commit: f345d43.

title: PR3 Schema And Domain Inventory
description: Plan and execute PR3 so Product Suite has one written schema and domain ownership inventory across roadmap-web and meeting-api before shared contracts work begins.
